prompt: Our data pipeline has been silently producing incorrect aggregations for 4 months. Downstream dashboards, ML models, and customer-facing reports all consumed the bad data. I need a plan to identify the scope of corruption, correct the data, and rebuild trust in the pipeline.

The infrastructure-as-code repository drifted from actual cloud state over 2 years. Terraform plans show 300+ changes because manual console changes were never codified. Some resources were created by scripts that no longer exist. Reconcile IaC with reality.

After a long-running misconfiguration in our connection pooler, the Postgres database has accumulated thousands of idle-in-transaction connections, bloated tables from skipped vacuums, and corrupted statistics. Query performance is 10x worse than baseline. Full database health restoration needed.

Our security posture has degraded across the entire stack. TLS configs use deprecated ciphers, 30% of dependencies have known CVEs, secrets are hardcoded in 15 repositories, and the last penetration test was 18 months ago. Design the comprehensive security restoration.

The API versioning strategy broke down. We have v1, v2, and v3 endpoints, but v2 has features v3 doesn't, v1 still has 60% of traffic, and there are undocumented differences between versions. Nobody knows the source of truth. Restore a coherent API surface.

Our git repository history has been corrupted by force pushes, squash-merges that lost context, and a bad rebase that duplicated 200 commits. Blame is unreliable, bisect doesn't work, and nobody trusts the git log. Restore the repository to a usable state.

The feature flag system has become ungovernable. There are 400 flags, 60% are stale, some have contradictory targeting rules, and nobody knows which flags are safe to remove. The system that was supposed to reduce risk is now itself a source of bugs. Systematic restoration needed.

Our documentation has decayed to the point of being dangerous. API docs describe endpoints that no longer exist, runbooks reference deprecated tools, onboarding guides point to dead links, and architecture diagrams show last year's topology. Restore the documentation to accuracy.
